projectDescription: A creative and diverse overworld terrain generation config pack for Terra on Minecraft 1.20+
keyFeatures: 50+ unique biomes including land, ocean, cave, and coast variants
Advanced cellular noise-based biome distribution system
Customizable terrain with terraces, overhangs, and pillar formations
Broad navigable rivers with special mountain variants
Extensive customization through YAML configuration files
Compatible with vanilla Minecraft (no new blocks or items)
publicApiSurface: biome-distribution/ - Biome placement and distribution configs
features/ - Terrain feature definitions (trees, boulders, flora)
palettes/ - Block palette definitions for terrain generation
structures/ - Structure files (trees, boulders, flower patches)
math/ - Mathematical functions and noise samplers
